achievements.title: Certifications & Training
achievements.description: Technical certifications and specialised training focused on wind turbine maintenance and technology.

list.title: GWO — Working at Heights
list.description: Working at Heights with PPE and rescue systems in nacelle environments. Skills Programme — EDP Renewables · Vestas Wind Systems (Jun. 2025).

list.title: GWO — First Aid
list.description: First Aid in industrial environments and working at height. Skills Programme — EDP Renewables · Vestas Wind Systems (Jun. 2025).

list.title: GWO — Manual Handling
list.description: Safe and ergonomic load handling in wind turbines. Skills Programme — EDP Renovables · Vestas Wind Systems (Jun. 2025).

list.title: Occupational Risk Prevention (PRL)
list.description: Full theoretical training in occupational risk prevention applied to industrial environments. Skills Programme — EDP Renewables · Vestas Wind Systems (Jun. 2025).

list.title: Drone Pilot — Open Category A1/A3
list.description: Licensed drone pilot in Open Category A1/A3, issued by AESA (Spanish Aviation Safety Agency). 2024.

list.title: Full Stack Web Development
list.description: 750 hours. React, Node.js, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Git/GitHub. Factoría F5 — 2024.

list.title: OO Programming & Relational Databases
list.description: 720 hours — in progress. Mentiona — pending internship for full qualification.
